overall.verdict: Struggling, leans fragile to Rain HO

suggestions.sentence: You win only 26% of speed interactions vs Rain HO — consider more Speed investment, a Choice Scarf, or priority moves.
Wins vs Hazard Stack Semi Stall lean heavily on Gliscor (46% of winning damage) — add a secondary win condition in case it goes down.
Slowking-Galar has not scored a single KO in 14 battles vs Bulky Offense — it may be too passive; consider a stronger attacking option or more offensive investment.

threats.evidence: Great Tusk Headlong Rush vs Slowking-Galar: 119.6%–141.0% (guaranteed OHKO)

sentences: Lead Slowking-Galar to pressure Pelipper.
Preserve Dragapult as your check to Great Tusk.
Watch Great Tusk's Headlong Rush into Slowking-Galar — don't let that trade happen for free.
You're on a clock vs their rain ho — don't let the game go long.
